title: OREGON VETERANS' HOMES - 211info
text: STATEWIDE VETERAN SERVICES SALEM OREGON VETERANS' HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Veterans' Homes provide professional medical, nursing, and long-term care, memory care, and short-term rehabilitative aid during recovery to allow residents to return home after hospitalization. Facilities are located in The Dalles and Lebanon. They are owned by the State of Oregon and are separate from the US Department of Veterans Affairs. 700 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Honorably discharged veterans and eligible spouses, as well as parents who had a child die while serving in the US Armed Forces Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 296-7190 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-7190 The Dalles Main phone (541) 497-7265 Lebanon Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. The Oregon Department of Veterans Affairs has Admission Liaisons to assist veterans and their families with questions about care and the admissions process. FEES: Medicaid, Medicare, private payment DOCUMENTS: DD214 LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Nursing Facilities * Veterans Veteran Homes Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - BENEFITS ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STATEWIDE VETERAN SERVICES SALEM
